name: Restore Container Settings
description: Restores static IP, hostname, nameserver and addon-managed lxc.environment entries (OIDC, SSL, ...) from the previous container during upgrade. Reads the old container's LXC config and applies preserved settings to the new container.

parameters.name: Previous VM ID
parameters.description: Old container ID to read settings from.

parameters.name: VM ID
parameters.description: New container ID to apply settings to.
